title: Senior Plant Manager at JK Tyre

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at JK Tyre
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? JK Tyre in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JK Tyre:
JK Tyre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
